style_desc: Benefit-led — opens with a concrete 2026 benefit/saving, then qualifies.
output:
TITLE: MedSave 2026

OPENING:
Hi, I'm calling from MedSave Insurance Agency. We're here to help you understand your Medicare benefits and make sure you're getting the most out of them.

PITCH:
Did you know that starting in 2026, there's a $2,100 annual cap on out-of-pocket prescription costs for Medicare Part D? That means after reaching this limit, your plan covers 100% of covered drugs for the rest of the year.

QUALIFY:
Can you confirm whether you have Part A (hospital insurance) and Part B (medical insurance) coverage through Medicare?

OBJECTION HANDLING:

* If "not interested":
  You're not interested in exploring your Medicare benefits right now? That's okay. We'll be happy to follow up with you later if you change your mind.

* If "is this a scam / who are you":
  I'm calling from MedSave Insurance Agency, and I want to assure you that we're a licensed insurance agency working exclusively with Medicare beneficiaries. We're here to help you understand and navigate the Medicare system.

* If "I'm busy":
  No problem at all! You're busy right now, and I completely understand. Let me just check a few things real quick... (pause) Okay, that was quick. Is there a better time for us to talk today?

TRANSFER:
I'd love to transfer you to one of our licensed specialists who can help you with your Medicare benefits. They'll be able to answer any questions you have and ensure you're getting the best possible coverage.

CLOSE (not interested):
Thank you so much for taking the time to speak with me today! I completely understand if you're not ready to explore your Medicare options right now. If you do decide to take advantage of these benefits in the future, please don't hesitate to reach out. And thank you again for allowing us to call you today.

Note: This script is designed to be warm and honest, focusing on a real 2026 benefit (out-of-pocket cap savings) while qualifying and honoring Do-Not-Call rules. It also handles objections in a compliant manner, ensuring that the conversation remains focused on providing value to the potential customer.
